---
title: "test_p1_v2_ascension.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_p1_v2_ascension.ts"
loc: 49
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.60
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 4.67
overall_score: 5.37
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [registry](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/pathRegistry.ts)
- [P1Daemon](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/daemon.ts)
- [GitChronograph](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/git_monitor.ts)
- [getFileGravity](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/intel/gravity_db.ts)

### Exports
- `statsDir`
- `pidFile`
- `daemon`
- `signalFile`
- `content`
- `currentFile`
- `churn`
- `testFile`
- `gravity`
- `root`
